creator: rob2g2-freebsd@bitbert.com
text: works fine here with "bhyve -c 1 -m 2048 -Hwl bootrom,/usr/local/share/uefi-firmware/BHYVE_UEFI.fd -U 60b8c81d-972c-49da-b582-5696ea090736 -u -s 0:0,hostbridge -s 31:0,lpc -s 4:0,virtio-blk,/data/vms/centos8t1/disk0.img -s 5:0,virtio-net,tap8,mac=58:9c:44:33:22:08 -s 6:0,fbuf,tcp=10.0.0.4:5908,vga=io -l com1,/dev/nmdm-centos8t1.1A -s 3:0,ahci-cd,/data/iso/centos/CentOS-8.2.2004-x86_64-dvd1.iso centos8t1"
